name: noc-tile
title: NOC KPI Tile
description: A KPI tile for the NOC wallboard grid: a severity status stripe and pulsing dot, a monitor name, a sublabel, a large mono value with optional unit, and an inline sparkline of recent history. Three variants — crit (red) / warn (orange) / ok (green) — drive accent, border tint and background wash from one local token. Presentational by default; renders as a button/link for drill-down with hover, focus and disabled states.
